create: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS roles (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE, description VARCHAR(255));
update: UPDATE roles SET name = %s, description = %s WHERE id = %s;

fetch.all: SELECT id, name, description FROM roles ORDER BY name;
fetch.by_name: SELECT id, name, description FROM roles WHERE name = %s;
fetch.by_id: SELECT id, name, description FROM roles WHERE id = %s;
